summary: Tested visual relevance fix for infographic generation. Backend API correctly uses visualType='none' for descriptive content (6/7 sections in fresh generation). Frontend correctly handles 'none' type with text-only cards. Export functionality exists and code is correct, though browser automation couldn't capture the download due to headless mode. All 8 backend tests passed.
passed_tests: 1. GET /api/sources - Returns 200 with 3 indexed sources (SOW-H@H, H@H Phased Scope, Slide Deck)
2. GET /api/ - API root returns 200 with correct message
4. Infographic slides_data contains sections array (7 sections)
5. visualType='none' used for 6/7 sections (descriptive content correctly identified)
6. visualType='process' used for 1/7 sections (Milestone-Based Delivery - correctly identified as sequential)
7. Empty stats for 'none' type sections (no fabricated statistics)
8. visualReason field included explaining each visual type choice
9. GET /api/outputs - Returns list of saved outputs
10. Frontend loads correctly - Health Intelligence Workspace visible
11. Studio page shows all 9 tool cards (Audio, Slides, Video, Mind Map, Report, Flashcards, Quiz, Infographic, Data Table)
12. Infographic preview modal displays correctly with Export and Save buttons
13. Card rendering shows numbered badges, titles, stats, and bullet points
critical_code_review_comments: Backend AI prompt (server.py lines 872-913) correctly instructs 'none' as default visualType
Frontend (NotebookLM_Workspace.jsx lines 1706-1708) correctly handles visualType='none' by skipping visual rendering
Card height calculation (line 1529) properly accounts for text-only cards with 'none' type
visualReason field provides transparency about AI's visual type decisions
seed_data_creation: Used existing sources (SOW-H@H, H@H Phased Scope, Slide Deck). Generated fresh infographic via API to verify fix.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Visual relevance fix verified working. Backend correctly defaults to visualType='none' for descriptive content. Frontend correctly renders text-only cards. Older infographics in database still have stats (generated before fix) - this is expected. Fresh generations via POST /api/generate show correct behavior with 6/7 sections using 'none' type. Export functionality code path is correct (canvas.toBlob at line 1851).
